data.title: YZi Labs Invests in BitGo's IPO
data.description: YZi Labs announced on X its strategic investment in BitGo's IPO as it debuts on the NYSE, backing "inevitably vital" regulated infrastructure required to onboard the next trillion dollars of institutional capital.BitGo is a U.S.-regulated, institutional-grade digital asset infrastructure platform that supports the full digital asset lifecycle, including staking-as-a-service for secure yield, and stablecoin-as-a-service.

data.title: Bitcoin Experiences Decline Amid US Clarity Act Delays
data.description: Bitcoin has recently fallen below the $90,000 mark, influenced by delays in the US Clarity Act. According to NS3.AI, these legislative delays are considered more significant for digital assets than changes in tariff policies. Despite the volatility, Bitcoin continues to show resilience, with institutional investors prioritizing productive capital deployment over simple holding strategies. The disruption in sovereign bond markets has emphasized ongoing structural pressures, revealing vulnerabilities in traditional safe-haven assets and impacting the risk appetite within the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Cybersecurity Breach at Central Maine Healthcare Exposes Patient Data
data.description: Central Maine Healthcare has reported a cybersecurity breach that occurred between March and June 2025, compromising the personal and health information of 145,000 patients. According to NS3.AI, the breach was discovered in June 2025, prompting an immediate investigation and notification to law enforcement authorities. In response to the incident, the healthcare provider is offering 12 months of free credit monitoring to affected individuals and has enhanced its security measures to prevent future breaches.

data.title: Ethereum's Role in Tokenized Assets Explored in BlackRock's 2026 Outlook
data.description:
BlackRock's 2026 Thematic Outlook underscores Ethereum's pivotal role in the tokenized assets sector, positioning it as a key infrastructure for on-chain settlement and fee capture. According to NS3.AI, Ethereum held over 65% of tokenized assets as of early January 2026. However, its market share may face challenges as asset issuance diversifies across various blockchains and rollups increase off-chain transaction volumes.

The report highlights the complexities of a growing multi-chain ecosystem, which could impact Ethereum's dominance in fee monetization. This raises questions about the future of settlement fees directly linked to ETH and emphasizes the significance of organic, economic throughput in maintaining its position.

data.title: Aster announced that it will launch SPACE spot and futures trading tonight.
data.description: Aster announced that it will launch spot trading of SPACE on January 23 at 20:00 (UTC+8), offering the SPACE/USD1 spot trading pair; and launch SPACE contract trading tonight at 22:00 (UTC+8), offering the SPACE/USDT contract trading pair. From January 23 to February 2, traders can share 150,000 USD worth of Aster and 15.75 million SPACE tokens.

data.title: Google Photos Introduces AI-Powered 'Me Meme' Feature for U.S. Users
data.description: Google Photos has launched a new experimental feature called 'Me Meme' on Android and iOS platforms. According to PANews, this tool allows users to transform selfies into memes using generative AI. Users can select an official template or upload a reference image, then choose a well-lit, clear frontal portrait to generate the meme. Once created, the meme can be edited, saved to the gallery, regenerated, or shared. The feature is currently being rolled out gradually to users in the United States, though Google has not disclosed further details about its usage scope or future plans. 'Me Meme' is part of the AI creation tools under the Create tab in Google Photos.

data.title: Nasdaq Lifts Contract Limit for Bitcoin and Ethereum ETF Options
data.description: Nasdaq has eliminated the 25,000-contract position limit for options on Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs. According to NS3.AI, this regulatory amendment, filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), took effect on Wednesday. The change is expected to enhance trading volume and provide more flexibility in options trading for these cryptocurrency ETFs.

data.title: Toncoin's Future Hinges on AI Integration and Telegram Ecosystem
data.description: Toncoin (TON) has experienced a 67% decline in value over the past year, alongside a notable decrease in total value locked (TVL). According to NS3.AI, despite these setbacks, development within the Telegram ecosystem remains active. Telegram has incorporated AI into its decentralized Cocoon AI protocol, utilizing TON as the payment method for AI services, thereby promoting a self-sustaining crypto economy. This initiative is supported by Anthony Scaramucci and AlphaTON, who are optimistic about AI-driven growth and Telegram's extensive user base contributing to TON's recovery in the next 24 to 36 months.

data.title: U.S. Senate Agriculture Committee Drafts Crypto Regulation Bill Amid Partisan Disagreements
data.description: The U.S. Senate Agriculture Committee has introduced a draft bill aimed at regulating the cryptocurrency market, including decentralized finance (DeFi) concerns. According to NS3.AI, the bill's advancement is hindered by partisan disagreements, with Democratic opposition stemming from political conflicts and concerns over consumer protection. Bipartisan support is necessary for the legislation to move forward. Meanwhile, the Senate Banking Committee's focus has shifted from crypto regulation to housing issues, which may lead to additional delays in the legislative process.

data.title: Morningstar Ventures Clarifies Role in Space Project Investment
data.description: Morningstar Ventures has clarified its position regarding the prediction market project Space, stating it is not the lead investor and was not involved in decisions related to its public sale. According to NS3.AI, the Space team has pledged to refund at least 50% of the funds from the public sale, with refund claims set to open on January 27. Morningstar Ventures is calling for transparency from the Space team concerning the usage of funds, current balances, and future plans. Additionally, they are urging the team to maximize refunds and expedite the release of the first version of the public product.

data.title: Bank of Japan Likely to Maintain Interest Rates Amid Economic Uncertainty
data.description: The Bank of Japan is anticipated to maintain its interest rates at 0.75%, following a previous increase to a three-decade high. According to NS3.AI, investors are keenly observing for indications regarding the timing and pace of potential future rate hikes, especially in light of political uncertainty and the weakening yen. This cautious approach may influence global liquidity and lead to short-term volatility in foreign exchange and cryptocurrency markets, with Bitcoin being notably affected.

data.title: Silver Prices Reach Record High Amid Increased Investor Interest
data.description: Spot silver prices have surpassed $97 per ounce, setting a new all-time high. According to NS3.AI, the price rose by 0.87% during the trading day. This increase highlights the growing interest among investors in silver as a valuable precious metal.

data.title: Altcoin Season Index Indicates Weak Performance Against Bitcoin
data.description: CoinMarketCap's Altcoin Season Index has decreased by two points, reaching a score of 30, which suggests a weak altcoin season. According to NS3.AI, this index evaluates the performance of the top 100 cryptocurrencies compared to Bitcoin over the last 90 days. A score of 75 or higher is indicative of a robust altcoin season, but the current figure implies that Bitcoin is outperforming the majority of altcoins.

data.title: BODL Ventures Founding Partner: Legendary Quantitative Fund QRT Increases Investment in Hong Kong Market and Launches Crypto Job Recruitment
data.description: Feng Liu, founding partner of BODL Ventures, revealed in an article on the X platform that legendary quantitative hedge fund QRT is ramping up its expansion in Hong Kong. Reports indicate that QRT has signed a contract for six floors of IFC Phase 2 in Central, Hong Kong, expected to open in the first quarter of next year, while simultaneously advancing its quietly operating Crypto Desk business. In recent months, QRT's Hong Kong office has been continuously recruiting for positions related to crypto asset research, quantitative analysis, and trading. Although its crypto trading activities are rarely publicly disclosed, industry insiders generally believe that QRT is accelerating the expansion of its crypto data and quantitative teams. QRT reportedly originated from Credit Suisse's London quantitative fund team, later achieving independence through a management buyout (MBO). Bloomberg once described it as a "mysterious quantitative fund that rewrote the rules of the $4.5 trillion hedge fund industry," but its specific operations remain largely undisclosed.

data.description:

data.description:
Solana absorbs heavy exits while price remains trapped inside a tight consolidation range.

data.title: Polymarket Faces Criticism Over False Information on Social Media
data.description:
On January 23, Polymarket, a prediction market platform, faced widespread criticism from the crypto and media communities for posting false information on its official X account. According to BlockBeats, investor DCinvestor announced unfollowing Polymarket's official account, citing the frequent dissemination of misleading information presented as 'breaking news,' which severely misguides users.

Media professional Rachel Karten also highlighted that Polymarket's official account 'often publishes completely fabricated news,' describing this behavior as 'very strange.'

A particular point of contention was a tweet labeled 'JUST IN,' where Polymarket claimed Jeff Bezos advised Gen Z entrepreneurs to work at companies like McDonald's or Palantir before considering entrepreneurship. Jeff Bezos himself directly refuted the claim, stating, 'Not true. I'm not sure why Polymarket would fabricate this.'

This incident has raised concerns about the credibility of Polymarket's information and its content review mechanisms. As the influence of prediction markets continues to grow, the dissemination of false information by official accounts is seen as potentially misleading for user decisions and market sentiment.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Advocates for Decentralized Social Media and Enhanced Privacy Measures by 2026
data.description: Vitalik Buterin has shared his vision for 2026, emphasizing the use of OpenStreetMap and encrypted email service Protonmail, while prioritizing decentralized social media to enhance data privacy. According to Foresight News, Buterin is committed to exploring local large language model (LLM) deployment strategies. His ideal approach involves utilizing local LLMs and compensating for parameter limitations with specialized fine-tuning models. For high-load scenarios, he suggests integrating query-based zero-knowledge payments, trusted execution environments, and local query filtering, essentially combining imperfect solutions for optimal protection. Buterin's ultimate goal remains the development of highly efficient fully homomorphic encryption technology. He argues that sending all data to third-party centralized services is unnecessary, as tools exist to significantly reduce such operations, and advocates for their continuous improvement and active use.

data.title: Bezos denied the rumors on Polymarket's official Twitter account, stating: "I don't know why you would fabricate this."
data.description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has refuted a Polymarket tweet that claimed he advised Gen Z entrepreneurs to work for real-world companies like McDonald's or Palantir before starting their own businesses. Bezos stated, "This is a rumor. I'm not sure why Polymarket would make this up."

data.title: Bitget Wallet launches native HYPE staking, deepening its integration with the Hyperliquid ecosystem.
data.description: According to an official announcement from Bitget Wallet, Bitget Wallet has expanded its integration with Hyperliquid and launched native HYPE staking in its wealth management section. Users can directly stake HYPE within their wallets and earn protocol-level returns (compounded daily), supported by official validator nodes operated by the Hyperliquid Foundation. Staking HYPE takes effect immediately, with interest accruing after a 1-day lock-up period; the current annualized yield exceeds 2%. Unstaking requires a 7-day cooling-off period, after which the principal and accumulated returns will be automatically returned to the wallet. This collaboration further deepens the end-to-end integration between Bitget Wallet and the Hyperliquid ecosystem. Compared to the current web-based staking process, this native integration allows users to complete HYPE staking and redemption on mobile devices and view key information such as daily returns more intuitively, further enhancing the daily user experience of on-chain wealth management. In addition to staking, Bitget Wallet supports Hyperliquid on-chain infrastructure capabilities such as exchange, perpetual trading, cross-chain transfers, and access to HyperEVM native DApps, helping users more efficiently complete the entire on-chain path from trading and yield to ecosystem participation. Official data shows that Bitget Wallet's Earn product saw nearly $200 million in quarterly subscriptions in 2025, more than 10 times the beginning of the year, indicating a continued growth in user demand for on-chain yields such as staking and stablecoin rewards. Building on this, Bitget Wallet continues to expand its multi-chain staking scale and offers annualized yields of approximately 2% to 10% depending on protocol mechanisms and market conditions. Currently, Bitget Wallet's self-built Solana nodes have over 100,000 SOL staked, reflecting the wider adoption of native wallet staking.
